form.label: Webapp Logs Overview
form.description: Access and error activity for index=webapp_logs (sample-app / Apache combined + error logs)

search.query: index=webapp_logs sourcetype=access_combined uri="$uri_filter_tok$" | rex field=_raw "\"\S+ \S+ \S+\" (?<status>\d{3})" | eval is_error=if(status>=400,1,0) | stats avg(is_error) as error_rate | eval error_rate=round(error_rate*100,2)
index=webapp_logs sourcetype=access_combined uri="$uri_filter_tok$" | rex field=_raw "^(?<clientip>\S+)" | stats dc(clientip) as unique_clients

panel.title: Requests Over Time by Status Class

search.query: index=webapp_logs sourcetype=access_combined uri="$uri_filter_tok$" | rex field=_raw "\"\S+ \S+ \S+\" (?<status>\d{3})" | eval status_class=case( status>=200 AND status<300, "2xx Success", status>=300 AND status<400, "3xx Redirect", status>=400 AND status<500, "4xx Client Error", status>=500, "5xx Server Error", 1=1, "Other") | timechart span=5m count by status_class

chart.option: {"2xx Success":0x53a051,"3xx Redirect":0x6db7c6,"4xx Client Error":0xf8be34,"5xx Server Error":0xdc4e41}

search.query: index=webapp_logs sourcetype=access_combined uri="$uri_filter_tok$" | rex field=_raw "\"\S+ \S+ \S+\" (?<status>\d{3})" | stats count by status | sort - count

index=webapp_logs sourcetype=access_combined uri="$uri_filter_tok$" | rex field=_raw "\"\S+ (?<uri>\S+) \S+\" (?<status>\d{3}) (?<bytes>\S+)" | stats count as requests, avg(bytes) as avg_bytes, dc(status) as distinct_status_codes by uri | eval avg_bytes=round(avg_bytes,0) | sort - requests | head 10

index=webapp_logs sourcetype=access_combined uri="$uri_filter_tok$" | rex field=_raw "^(?<clientip>\S+)" | rex field=_raw "\"\S+ \S+ \S+\" (?<status>\d{3})" | stats count as requests, count(eval(status>=400)) as error_requests by clientip | sort - requests | head 10

panel.title: Apache Errors Over Time by Severity

search.query: index=webapp_logs sourcetype=httpd_error | rex field=_raw "^\[[^\]]+\] \[(?<severity>\w+)\]" | timechart span=5m count by severity

index=webapp_logs sourcetype=httpd_error | rex field=_raw "^\[(?<error_time>[^\]]+)\] \[(?<severity>\w+)\] \[client (?<client_ip>[^\]]+)\] (?<message>.*)" | table _time, severity, client_ip, message | sort - _time | head 25
